files.README.md:
# {{project_name}}

{{description}}

## Features
- Pure HTML5 Canvas (no dependencies)
- Color-matching puzzle gameplay
- Mouse controls
- Combo system for bigger scores
- Particle effects
- 60-second timed mode
- High score persistence
- Smooth animations

## How to Play
1. Click on groups of 3 or more matching colored blocks
2. Larger groups give more points and increase your combo
3. Clear as many blocks as you can before time runs out!

## Controls
- Mouse Click: Select and clear groups of matching colors

## Running
Simply open `index.html` in any modern web browser.

```bash
# Optional: use a simple HTTP server
npx serve .
```

## Project Structure
```
├── index.html          # Game entry point
└── js/
    └── game.js         # Main game logic
```

## Extension Points

### Power-ups
Add special power-ups: bomb (clears area), rainbow (matches any color), time bonus.

### Game Modes
Add different modes: endless mode, target score mode, limited moves mode.

### Special Blocks
Add blocks with special properties: frozen blocks, locked blocks, striped blocks.

### Multiplayer
Add local turn-based multiplayer or online leaderboards.

### Sound Effects
Add satisfying sounds for matches, combos, and game over.
